name: Apple Cider
recipeIngredient: Apples (wind-fall or crabapples), washed and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples and core them.
2. Grind through a cider press to extract the juice.
3. Strain the juice to remove any solids.
4. Boil the strained juice for five minutes.
5. Seal the container with a lid to preserve the apple cider.
